title: Z-Wave Smart Plugs: 5 Best Options Compared (2026)
excerpt: We compared 5 currently in-stock z-wave smart plugs options, using real listed prices and product details…
body:
We compared 5 currently in-stock z-wave smart plugs options, using real listed prices and product details (data pulled at time of publishing). Below: a quick comparison table, an image gallery of every option, then a detailed breakdown of each pick with pros, cons, and buying guidance.

Quick Comparison

ImageProductBrandPriceLink
#1 Minoston Z-Wave 800 Series Mini Smart Plug foMinoston$47.59Check Price →
#2 Minoston Z-Wave 800 Series Dual Smart Plug foMinoston$28.89Check Price →
#3 Minoston Z-Wave 800 Series Dimmer Smart Plug Minoston$27.20Check Price →
#4 Minoston Z-Wave 800 Series Smart Plug for OutMinoston$26.35Check Price →
#5 Minoston Z-Wave Smart Plug Energy Power MonitMinoston$26.34Check Price →

Product Gallery

Detailed Breakdown

#1 — Minoston Z-Wave 800 Series Mini Smart Plug for Indoor (MP21Z)

Minoston

$47.59 at time of publishing

Check Price →

Pros
  • Remote and Voice control: A large range of types of load are supported to be controlled like lamps or small appliances from anywhere and any time by your mobile devices. Hands-free voice control by Alexa like: “Alexa, turn on the coffee maker”. Home automation is from a little Z-Wave Plug to control small appliances that you want. Timer and schedule: Control lights and applications to turn on or off via a schedule at certain time of the day to meet your needs and reduce your electricity bill. Set up custom scenes with other zwave devices to enrich intelligent life. Mini Z-Wave Outlets but Poweful: Mini size design of this zwave plug makes it portable and you can make the most of your wall outlets. Suitable for your home applications with 15A, 125 VAC grounding receptacle for use with a wide variety of lamps and appliances. Reliable Z-Wave 800 Series: This zwave plug has built-in a 800 series chip. This 800 series zwave plug has better signal coverage than ever, and faster communication, with S2 authenticated security and SmartStart for effortless pairing. Extend the wireless coverage up to 1300ft if your hub supports Long Range. Easy to Setup: S2 end-to-end security and Smartstart pre-programming make the setup process more easy. No wiring is required. Simply plug in the device to a wall outlet and connect to your hub for convenient smart outlet features. This Z-Wave outlet smart plug is compatible with those Z-Wave hub: SmartThings, Vera, Wink, Fibaro, Homeseer, Ring, 2GIG, Hubitat(change device type). ALEXA & GOOGLE ASSISTANT COMPATIBLE (requires a Z-Wave certified hub). CANNOT connect directly with ECHO PLUS！Z-Wave Frequency: 908.42MHz. FCC & ETL listed.
  • Sold under the established Minoston brand
Cons
  • Priced at the top of this comparison

Best suited for: Buyers prioritizing brand reputation or extra features over price.

Consider the alternative if: If budget is the main concern, the lower-priced options in this list are worth a look first.

Value for money: Mid-to-upper pricing relative to the other options compared here.

#2 — Minoston Z-Wave 800 Series Dual Smart Plug for Outdoor and Indoor (MP24Z)

Minoston

$28.89 at time of publishing

Check Price →

Pros
  • [Reliable Z-Wave 800 Series] This zwave plug has built-in a 800 series chip. This 800 series zwave plug has better signal coverage than ever, and faster communication, with S2 authenticated security and SmartStart for effortless pairing. Extend the wireless coverage up to 1300ft if your hub supports Long Range. [Z-Wave Plug with 2 Independently Controlled outlets] This smart plug has 2 outles that can be controlled independently. Enable to rename them and control one of them. Zwave smart outlet uses far less power than Wi-Fi or regular Bluetooth and more flexible and more secure for your data(S2+Smartstar) than Wi-Fi. Its signal can travel through sensors and intervening devices to get where it needs to go. [Easy to Setup] Less than 1 minute to add this zwave plug to your z-wave hub. Just scan the QR code and press the button 3 times quickly. Plug the home appliances into this zwave plug. This way ordinary appliances can be turned into smart appliances. [IP65 Rainproof] The IP65 weatherproof of this zwave smart plug ensures that the device can work properly in rainy days. Please hang it vertically to ensure the waterproof function of the casing. [Intelligent Function] A schedule and timer can be set up and cycle every day. This z-wave plug can remote control with APP and voice control. Enable to set timers for it to turn the device on or off automatically. Saves the energy when plug-in appliances are not needed or accidentally switched on. [Z-Wave Hub required] This zwave outdoor smart plug is compatible with SmartThings, Vera, Fibaro, Hubitat, and Home Assistant. Work with Alexa & Google Assistant (Z-Wave hub required). CANNOT connect directly with ECHO PLUS! Z-Wave Frequency: 908.42MHz. FCC & ETL listed. NOTE: This zwave outlet CANNOT compatible with Honeywell, Ring, ClareHome CLIQ-mini, Vivint!!
  • Sold under the established Minoston brand
Cons
  • No standout drawback versus the other options compared here

Best suited for: Buyers who want a balance of price and features without going to either extreme.

Consider the alternative if: If you specifically need premium extras, the higher-priced pick in this set may suit better.

Value for money: Mid-to-upper pricing relative to the other options compared here.

#3 — Minoston Z-Wave 800 Series Dimmer Smart Plug for Outdoor and Indoor (MP22ZD)

Minoston

$27.20 at time of publishing

Check Price →

Pros
  • This Z-Wave outdoor dimmer plug compatible with those Z-Wave hub: SmartThings, Vera, Wink, Fibaro, Homeseer, 2GIG, Hubitat(change device type). ALEXA & GOOGLE ASSISTANT COMPATIBLE (requires a Z-Wave certified hub). CANNOT connect directly with ECHO PLUS！Z-Wave Frequency: 908.42MHz. FCC & ETL listed. 0-100% Dimming and Voice Control: This Z-Wave outdoor dimmer for string lights can adjust the light brightness from 0-100% by voice commands. Just say:“Hey Alexa, set the led strip lights to 75%”. Ideal for Outdoor: IP65 weatherproof housing. Ideal for Garden, Backyard, Kitchen, Bathroom, Porch, Balcony, Garage, Basement, Patio or Electric grill, Sprinkler, Washing machine, Christmas tree, landscape lighting, fountains, lamps, pumps, and other outdoor or indoor-use electric appliances. Schedule and Timer: You can set automatic daily timers or create on/off routing so that the Z-Wave plug can turn on and off automatically. And saving energy when the plugged-in appliances are not needed or are left on by accident. 400W Max Power Z-Wave Dimmer Plug: The Z-Wave plug-in smart dimmer plug works with dimmable string lights in LED, INC bulb. Please make sure your string lights are dimmable and the total power is less than 400W. 150W Max for LED/CFL, 400W Max for Incandescent.
  • Sold under the established Minoston brand
Cons
  • No standout drawback versus the other options compared here

Best suited for: Buyers who want a balance of price and features without going to either extreme.

Consider the alternative if: If you specifically need premium extras, the higher-priced pick in this set may suit better.

Value for money: Mid-to-upper pricing relative to the other options compared here.

#4 — Minoston Z-Wave 800 Series Smart Plug for Outdoor and Indoor (MP22Z)

Minoston

$26.35 at time of publishing

Check Price →

Pros
  • [Z-Wave 800 Chip Plug] This zwave outlet is bulit-in a zwave 800 chip. The zwave 800 series smart plugs are more reliable and faster wireless, have a longer range and are more secure than the 700 series. It can up to 1300ft in the open range if your hub support Z-Wave LR. [Compatibility] This z-wave outdoor plug can remotely control. It is compatible with SmartThings, Vera, Wink, Fibaro, Homeseer, Ring, 2GIG, and Hubitat (change device type). CANNOT work directly with ECHO PLUS! It is also compatible with ALEXA and GOOGLE ASSISTANT (requires a Z-Wave certified hub). Able to control with voice command. [Ideal for Outdoor] The IP65 Weather-resistant housing of this zwave plug is ideal for the Garden, Backyard, Kitchen, Bathroom, Porch, Balcony, Garage, Basement, Patio or Electric grill, Sprinkler, Washing machine, Christmas tree, landscape lighting, fountains, lamps, pumps, and other outdoor or indoor-use electric appliances, etc. [Compact but Powerful] This 800 Z-Wave outlet is mini but its max loading is up to 15A and 1875W. Its power is 125V, 60Hz. Z-Wave Frequency: 908.42MHz. FCC and ETL listed. It's compatible with LED, halogen, incandescent, xenon, fluorescent and compact fluorescent bulbs. [Schedule and Countdown Timer] You can set automatic daily timers or create on/off routing so your outdoor smart plug can turn on and off automatically. And saving energy when the plugged-in appliances are not needed or are left on by accident. [Easy to Setup] Pair this zwave outlet to your hub and plug in the device you want to remote control. Scan the QR code and press the button 3 times to pair it. Then you can use your cellphone to turn the device on/off, schedule an event, and group the devices you want to control together. [Advanced Settings] If your zwave controller supports advanced settings, Minoston zwave outdoor smart plug allows setting parameters and supports scene settings. [As a Z-Wave Repeater] This zwave plug can be used in Z-Wave home automation networks to extend the range and reliability of the Z-Wave signal. By repeating the signal, the repeater helps maintain a stable and reliable network.
  • Sold under the established Minoston brand
Cons
  • No standout drawback versus the other options compared here

Best suited for: Buyers who want a balance of price and features without going to either extreme.

Consider the alternative if: If you specifically need premium extras, the higher-priced pick in this set may suit better.

Value for money: Mid-to-upper pricing relative to the other options compared here.

#5 — Minoston Z-Wave Smart Plug Energy Power Monitor 800 Series for Indooor (MP21ZP)

Minoston

$26.34 at time of publishing

Check Price →

Pros
  • [Reliabble 800 Series Z-wave smart Plug] Built-in an 800 series chip. This 800 series zwave plug has better signal coverage than ever, and faster communication, with S2 authenticated security and SmartStart for effortless pairing. Extend the wireless coverage up to 1300ft if your hub supports Long Range. [Power Meter Z-Wave Plug] Supports check the power or energy usage on the app. It helps to analyze electricity consumption so that you can understand the structure of your electricity consumption and reduce it. [Easy to Setup and High Security] SmartStart pre-programmed zwave plug only needs to be scanned and press the button 3 times to add devices (Less than 1 min). The high security of S2 ensures your privacy and is not easily attacked by hackers. [Wireless and Voice Control] Connect the zwave plug to the z-wave hub (sold separately) and then you can use an app to remotely control it through the z-wave controller. Compatible with Alexa and Google Assistant(hub required). Voice control it by saying "Adjust light to 75% brightness." [Timer Schedule] Support timer and schedule setting. Allow the zwave dimmer plug to be turned on or off automatically, or adjust to a specific brightness at a specific time. [Require a Z-Wave Hub (sold separately)] This zwave plug is compatible with SmartThings, Hubitat, Vera, Wink, Z-Box Hub, Fibaro, Ring, 2GIG, HomeSeer, ect.CANNOT connect directly with ECHO PLUS!
  • Lowest price point in this lineup
  • Sold under the established Minoston brand
Cons
  • No standout drawback versus the other options compared here

Best suited for: Budget-conscious buyers who want solid value without paying for extras.

Consider the alternative if: If you specifically need premium extras, the higher-priced pick in this set may suit better.

Value for money: Strong value: the lowest price in this comparison.

Final Recommendation

Best value / budget pick: #5 Minoston Z-Wave Smart Plug Energy Power Monitor 800 Series for Indooor (MP21ZP)

the lowest price point among the options compared.

Check Price →

Premium pick: #1 Minoston Z-Wave 800 Series Mini Smart Plug for Indoor (MP21Z)

the top of this comparison’s price range.

Check Price →

If you’re unsure, the budget pick is the lower-risk choice on price; the premium pick suits buyers prioritizing brand or features.
